The species is further classified within the genus Milnea, which is a small genus of flowering plants native to tropical Africa. The plant is classified as a shrub or small tree that is native to West Africa. Milnea pirifera is also classified as an evergreen species, meaning it retains its leaves throughout the year. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics, growth habits, and distribution.
